samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_8bit">
    <description>Implement an 8-bit multiplier based on shifting and adding.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="A" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input operand A (multiplicand).</input>
        <input id="B" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input operand B (multiplier).</input>
        <output id="product" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit output product.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="STATE" type="uint8">
            <enum-value id="IDLE" value="0x00">Idle state.</enum-value>
            <enum-value id="ADD" value="0x01">Addition state.</enum-value>
            <enum-value id="SHIFT" value="0x02">Shifting state.</enum-value>
        </enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="[15:0]" id="product_reg">16-bit register to store the product.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="[7:0]" id="shift_cnt">8-bit register to count shifts.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="state">State register for the FSM.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="A_reg" width_description="[7:0]">Register to store input A.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="B_reg" width_description="[7:0]">Register to store input B.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <assign id="A_reg">A;</assign>
        <assign id="B_reg">B;</assign>
        <assign id="state">STATE.IDLE;</assign>
        <always @(*)>
            <case>
                <case-item id="state">
                    <case-value id="STATE.IDLE">
                        <if>
                            <condition id="A_reg == 8'h00">A_reg == 8'h00</condition>
                            <then>
                                <assign id="product_reg">0;</assign>
                                <assign id="shift_cnt">0;</assign>
                                <assign id="state">STATE.ADD;</assign>
                            </then>
                            <else>
                                <assign id="state">STATE.ADD;</assign>
                            </else>
                        </if>
                    </case-value>
                    <case-value id="STATE.ADD">
                        <assign id="product_reg">product_reg + (B_reg[shift_cnt] == 1'b1 ? A_reg : 8'h00) << shift_cnt;</assign>
                        <assign id="shift_cnt">shift_cnt + 1;</assign>
                        <if>
                            <condition id="shift_cnt == 8'h08">shift_cnt == 8'h08</condition>
                            <then>
                                <assign id="state">STATE.IDLE;</assign>
                            </then>
                            <else>
                                <assign id="state">STATE.SHIFT;</assign>
                            </else>
                        </if>
                    </assign-value>
                    <case-value id="STATE.SHIFT">
                        <assign id="product_reg">product_reg;</assign>
                        <assign id="state">STATE.ADD;</assign>
                    </case-value>
                </case-item>
            </case>
        </always>
        <assign id="product">product_reg;</assign>
    </implementation>
</module>
